title: fragaria vesca subsp. pratensis
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. pratensis, also known as the wood strawberry or wild strawberry, is a subspecies of the Fragaria vesca species, which is a type of wild strawberry native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The wood strawberry has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
